common.editInPlace: The selected item is edited directly on the right
common.selectOrCreate: Pick an item to edit, or create a new one

settings.title: Settings
settings.pageIntro: Adjust theme, language, and update behavior. Changes take effect immediately without leaving this page.
settings.themeDesc: Choose the look of the main interface. Changes sync to both the main window and the popup.
settings.themeLightDesc: Bright and clean, ideal for daytime use.
settings.themeDarkDesc: Black-forward and better suited for nighttime and focused work.
settings.themeSystemDesc: Follows the system appearance automatically, with no manual switching needed.
settings.languageDesc: Switch the app language and update the list, editor, and popup together.
settings.updateDesc: Manually check for a new version and complete the update flow in the current window.
settings.noUpdate: You are on the latest version
settings.updateCompleted: Update to version {version} completed. Application will restart.
settings.tipTheme: Theme changes affect both the main window and the status bar popup.
settings.tipLanguage: Language changes refresh the current interface text immediately.
settings.tipUpdate: The app restarts automatically after an update finishes.
